---
title: "PlaybackHUD.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\PlaybackHUD.tsx"
loc: 104
complexity: 6
logic_score: 8.55
style_score: 2.74
intel_score: 2.77
overall_score: 3.82
---

## Intent
The `PlaybackHUD.tsx` module implements the chronological playback controls for the visualization. it allows architects to scrub through historical repository states, observing how gravity, complexity, and structural maturity have evolved over time.

## Interaction Protocol
This component provides the TUI-like interface at the bottom of the screen. It interacts with the global application state to drive the `currentIndex` of the neural data, triggering visual updates as the timeline is navigated.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)

### Exports
- `PlaybackHUD`
- `PlaybackHUD`
